entities.description: As a subsection of '3.2电气特性', this section provides an overview of thermal imaging diagrams, which are used to illustrate the thermal performance and heat distribution characteristics of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the visual representation of thermal data, used to analyze the heat distribution and performance of the hardware.

relations.description: The concept of '热成像图' is the primary topic of section 3.3.
